title: ADVOCACY AND DAY SUPPORTS ACTIVITIES - 211info
text: ARC OF BENTON COUNTY ADVOCACY AND DAY SUPPORTS ACTIVITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy services, an employment training program, and supported recreational activities such as art instruction, poetry classes, bowling, game nights, movies, and others. A community calendar with listings of activities can be found on the website. If one-on-one assistance is required for recreational activities, individuals must provide their own staff. 928 NW Beca Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Recreational activites: Ages 18 and older with intellectual or developmental disabilites and their families All other services: Individuals with intellectual or developmental disabilities and their families. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 602-9225 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 602-9225 Hayden Peterson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP. DOCUMENTS: Current Participant Profile LANGUAGES: English, limited Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West off 9th Street onto Beca Avenue. Store on corner of 10th Street and Beca Avenue. Route 2 of City Transit System stops on 9th Street near Beca Avenue. Services: Disability Rights Groups Health/Disability Related Social Clubs Job Training Formats * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - COMMCARD PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - ARC THRIFT STORES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC OF BENTON COUNTY
